## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed (if applicable). Include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change
Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (typo, broken link, formatting)
- [ ] New content (tutorial, guide, syllabus, etc.)
- [ ] Translation update (English/Indonesian parity)

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (Standard Markdown).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own content.
- [ ] I have checked for broken links and typos.
- [ ] I have added both English and Indonesian versions (if applicable).
